["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["Kubernetes 是用于自动部署，扩展和管理容器化应用程序的开源系统。详情可见 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://kubernetes.io/zh/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官方介绍"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在以下 URL 中，所有仓库的公钥均相同，因此只需要将仓库地址中的 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"v1.28"}]," 修改为所需的版本。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"debian--ubuntu-用户","children":"Debian / Ubuntu 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"首先导入 gpg key："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["新建 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list"}],"，内容为"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"使用 CRI-O","name":"cri_o","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "}],"templateId":"template-1","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"rhel--centos-用户","children":"RHEL / CentOS 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["新建 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo"}],"，内容为："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"使用 CRI-O","name":"cri_o","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "}],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/yum.repos.d/kubernetes.repo","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"minikube","children":"Minikube"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"请到 Minikube 镜像，即一些镜像站的 </github-release/kubernetes/minikube/LatestRelease/> 路径下载。"}]]}]
